summary: Completed comprehensive testing of renewal guide webpage with submit functionality. Fixed critical frontend React error. Backend API working correctly but email delivery failing due to invalid Resend API key.

critical_bugs.issue: Email delivery failing with 'API key is invalid' error
critical_bugs.impact: Submissions are recorded but confirmation emails not sent
critical_bugs.details: Resend API key 'sk-emergent-1Cf4531Be7882E84fF' is invalid. Need valid API key for email functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: React error when displaying validation errors - 'Objects are not valid as a React child'
ui_bugs.details: Fixed error handling to properly parse validation error arrays from API responses

passed_tests: URL parameters pre-fill form fields correctly (?email=test@test.com&name=John&rent=60000&escalation=8)
Email input field accepts and validates email addresses
Submit button is present and clickable
Submit button shows proper disabled state when email is empty
API endpoint POST /api/renewal/submit exists and accepts payload
Email validation works (422 error for invalid email)
Field validation works (422 error for missing fields)
Calculator updates rent and savings correctly
Error messages display properly after frontend fix

success_percentage.backend: 60% (API works, validation works, email delivery fails)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all features work after React error fix)

action_item_for_main_agent: Replace invalid Resend API key 'sk-emergent-1Cf4531Be7882E84fF' with valid key to enable email delivery functionality. All other features working correctly.
